title: Acti puts AI agents directly into your smartphone keyboard
friendlyTitle: An AI keyboard wants to help inside your apps
summary: Acti launched an agentic keyboard for iOS and Android that lets users trigger AI actions inside apps such as messaging, email, and social platforms. Its Skills feature lets people create custom AI shortcuts in natural language, while the company says personal context stays local by default.
friendlySummary: Acti made a phone keyboard that can translate, suggest, fetch info, and run shortcuts while you type.
whyItMatters: The keyboard is a plausible everyday AI surface because it sits where intent is expressed. If privacy and reliability hold up, AI assistance may feel less like opening a separate chatbot and more like adding actions to normal typing.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This could make AI more useful in daily messages and work apps without switching screens.
